difficultyMetrics.difficultyNote: Hard: 45 tiles, 3 layers, many visible key decoys.
difficultyMetrics.strategicGoal: Hard levels: many repeated visible keys/decoys. Player must pick the correct key position to unlock the next required item.
difficultyMetrics.rebalanceNotes: Reordered by difficulty score for smoother 1-100 progression; wrongTrayMaxSlots adjusted by new band. Board, orders, tile positions, and solution path are preserved.
